title: Next Trip
content:

And would probably be the last trip for this year, for a reason.

P.S. But what should I do since I don’t do diving? Suggestion?

P.S. [ Later in the evening ] Come to think of it, there’ll probably at least one or two more trips this year; one trip to Chiang Mai this May and probably again later this year. Then again, that’s future. Please keep reading. ;)
